titleStmt.title: SII 17.631: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 631. (A.R. No. 585 of 1904.) KAḶḶA-PERUMBŪR, TANJORE TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: In the gōpura of Kailāsanātha temple, left of entrance.

The king who is described in this inscription as Kulōttuṅga who conquered Madurai, Īḻam and Karuvūr and captured the crowned head of the Pāṇḍya is evidently identical with Kulōttuṅga III. The details of date given, viz., year 23, Vṛiśchika ba. 13, Monday, Viśākham, correspond to 1200 A.D., November 6, ·52; f.d.n. ·84.

It records the gift of land in Amaṇguḍi in Śrī Rājasundari-chchaturvēdimaṅgalam a brahmadēya in Tañjāvūr-kkūṟṟam in Pāṇḍikulāśani-vaḷanāḍu to god Uḍaiyār at Śrīkayilai alias Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-Īśvaram by Āṇḍāṉpiḷḷai alias Ādivarāhabhaṭṭaṉ alias Śīkāḻippiḷḷai of Virudarājabhayaṅkarachchēri in Āmbalūr. It is stated that the gift land was acquired by the donor partly by inheritance from his father on his death and partly by purchase from his brother.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
hara svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ ma
turaiyum Īḻamum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅ
kruvūruṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevarkku
Iyāṇṭu 2 10 3 vatu vṛścikanāyaṟṟu Apara pakṣattu tṛyo
daśiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa vicākattu nāḷ pāṇṭikulā
caṉi vaḷanāṭṭu tañcāvūrk kūṟṟattu(va) brahmateyam śrī rājacuntariccatu
rvetimaṅkalattu Uṭaiyār [śrī]kayilaiyāṉa kulottuṅka coḻa
Īśvara muṭaiyār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvaradevarkku Ivvūr viruta
rājapayaṅkaracceri Āmpalūr Āṇṭāṉ piḷḷaiyāṉa Ātivarākapa
ṭṭaṉāṉa cikāḻippiḷḷaiyeṉ dharmmadāṉamāka nir vārttukkuṭutta nila
māvatu Ivvūrkkiḻpiṭākai Amaṇkuṭiyi[ṟ ]rāpativatikkuk kiḻak
ku virutarājapayaṅkara vāykkālukkut teṟku tirattu meṟkaṭai
pitākkaḷ pakkaṟ peṟṟa kūṟṟālum tāṉattālum peṟṟu
ṭaiyeṉāy Eṉṉutāy varukiṟa nilam tma Innilam mukkāṇiyum Iṅ
ke 3 kuḻi Iccatirattu Icceykku Aṭaippa ṉ kūṟṟolai
meṟpaṭṭa maṉai nilam � Innilamuntirikaiyum teṅkaṅkuṭi
yil Ivvatikku kiḻakku Ivvāykkālukku vaṭakku 4 kuḻi catirattu
meṟkaṭaiya nilam 3mā� Iṉ Utteca nikki Itaṉ kiḻakku Eṅkaḷ pitākkaḷ
Apāvattu Eṉ kūṟṟāṟ peṟṟuṭaiyayeṉāyum Eṉ bhrātākkaḷ pakkal vilai
koṇṭuṭaiyeṉāyum Eṉṉutāy varukiṟa nilam � Innilam Araimāmun
tirikaiyum Iṅke 8 kuḻi 2 catirattu Innilattuṭaṉ Eṉṉutāyum Eṉ bhrātā
kkaḷ pakkal vilaikoṇṭuṭaiyeṉāyum varukiṟa Uttecam nilam kiḻakku� I
ṉ nilaṅkiḻaraiyum Āka natta maṉaikaḷ Uḷpaṭa nī pama � kiṟā Innila
m mākāṇi Araikkāṇik kiḻaraiyum Iṟṟai nāḷāl dharmmadāṉamāka nirvār
ttukkuṭutteṉ Ivvāticaṇṭeśvaradevarkku Ivvāmpalūr Āṇṭāṉ
piḷḷaiyāṉa Ātivarāka paṭṭaṉāṉa cirkāḻip piḷḷaiyeṉ:
Digital edition of SII 17.631 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
